## Summary

Describe the behavior and why the change is needed.

## Release impact

- [ ] Patch release (`fix:` or `docs:`)
- [ ] Minor release (`feat:`)
- [ ] Major release (`!` or `BREAKING CHANGE:`)
- [ ] No release (`chore:`, `test:`, or `refactor:`)

Expected squash commit title: `type(scope?): lowercase summary`

## Verification

- [ ] All required checks documented in `CONTRIBUTING.md` pass locally.
- [ ] No real PDFs, personal data, credentials, or active tracking numbers are included.
- [ ] Public API or schema changes are documented and have the correct release impact.
